chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2954 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.12803/2018 2. For hearing of main case 23.01.2025 Mr. Darvesh K. Mandhan, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh advocate files Vakalatnamas on behalf of respondents No. 2 and 3, which are taken on record.. Per learned counsel this petition is squarely covered by the Division Bench judgment of this Court in the case of Premier Systems Pvt.Ltd. vs. Federation of Pakistan and others reported as PTD 2018 861. Learned counsel states that this petition may also be disposed of in mutatis mutandis application thereof. Learned counsel for the department has no cavil to the aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
